basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Vacancies Increased to 776 Sub Accountant, Sub Auditor & Accountant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB), Gandhinagar
basic_details.post_name: 1. Peta Hisabnish / Sub Auditor (Class-3) 2. Hisabnish, Auditor / Peta Treasury Officer / Inspector (Class-3)
basic_details.short_information: GSSSB is conducting direct recruitment for a large number of posts in the Finance Department, Accounts, and Treasury offices under the Government of Gujarat. This recruitment is being done through a competitive examination process. application_fee.details: For General - Preliminary Exam Fee: Rs 500/- For General - Main Exam Fee: Rs 400/- For Reserved Categories - Preliminary Exam Fee: Rs 600 For Reserved Categories - Main Exam Fee: Rs 500 | Fee details will be as per the original advertisement. Generally: | General / SEBC / EWS: Higher fee for Preliminary + Main Exam SC / ST / PwBD: Concessional fee | Payment must be done online by 02 July 2026.

age_limit.details: Note: In no case should the age exceed 45 years.

qualification.details: Candidates must meet all conditions as on the respective cut-off dates.
qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree in BBA / BCA / B.Com / B.Sc (Mathematics or Statistics) / BA (Statistics / Economics / Mathematics) or equivalent from a recognized University. B.Sc (CA & IT) and M.Sc (CA & IT) are NOT eligible.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Accountant / Auditor / Deputy Treasury Officer / Inspector, Class-3

selection_process: The selection will be made through:
Preliminary Examination (Objective Type – Screening) Main Examination (Descriptive / Written) Document Verification
Final merit list will be prepared on the basis of marks obtained in the Main Examination (and Preliminary where applicable).

Maintaining accurate financial accounts and records of government departments Conducting internal audits and inspections Assisting in preparation of budgets and financial statements Handling treasury operations and disbursements Ensuring compliance with financial rules
and government orders Preparing various reports and returns for higher authorities Any other duties assigned by the superior officers
how_to_apply: Click on “Online Application” and select the relevant advertisement.
Register with a valid mobile number and email ID.
Fill all personal, educational, and category details carefully.
Upload scanned photograph, signature, and other documents.
Submit the application and note down the Confirmation Number.
Take a printout of the submitted form for future reference.
Caste / Non-Creamy Layer / EWS Certificate (if applicable)
important_instructions: Candidates can apply only once. Multiple applications will be rejected. All information filled must be correct. Wrong information leads to cancellation. This is regular government employment with all benefits. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. The Board reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage.

all_official_links.label: Download GSSSB Sub Accountant Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply online for GSSSB Sub Accountant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application under the corrected advertisement is 30 June 2026. Candidates should not wait until the last day to avoid technical issues. The fee payment window closes on 02 July 2026. Early application is highly recommended.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are available in GSSSB Advt. 366/202526?
faq.answer: After the correction, the total vacancies have been increased to 776 — 671 posts for Sub Accountant/Sub Auditor and 105 posts for Accountant/ Auditor/ Deputy Treasury Officer/ Inspector.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required educational qualification for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Bachelor’s Degree in BBA, BCA, B.Com, B.Sc (Maths/Statistics), or BA (Statistics/Economics/Mathematics) from a recognized university. The degree must be completed on or before 30 June 2026. B.Sc (CA & IT) and M.Sc (CA & IT) are not considered eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for GSSSB Sub Accountant posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 20 to 35 years as on 30 November 2025. Upper age relaxation is provided for reserved categories, women, PwBD, and Ex-Servicemen as per Gujarat Government norms (maximum 45 years in any case).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for GSSSB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, application/examination fee is applicable. General category candidates pay higher fees while SC/ST/PwBD candidates get concessions. Exact fee structure is mentioned in the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for GSSSB Class-3 Finance posts?
faq.answer: Selection is based on Preliminary Objective Exam, Main Written Exam, and Document Verification. Only candidates qualifying both exams will be called for document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for selected candidates?
faq.answer: For the first five years, a fixed pay is given (₹26,000 for Sub Auditor and ₹49,600 for Accountant cadre). After five years of satisfactory service, regular pay scales (Level-4 and Level-7) are applicable as per 7th Pay Commission.

faq.question: Q8. Do previous applicants need to apply again?
faq.answer: No. Candidates who had successfully submitted and confirmed their application in November 2025 do not need to re-apply. Only new candidates or those whose previous applications were invalid should apply afresh.

faq.question: Q9. Is computer knowledge mandatory?
faq.answer: Yes. Basic computer knowledge as prescribed by the Government of Gujarat is required. Candidates will have to produce proof at the time of appointment if not submitted earlier.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be posted in various Accounts, Treasury, and Finance offices across different districts of Gujarat as per the requirement of the Finance Department.
